ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch to which the course belongs */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of study for which the course is intended */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Credits awarded on completion of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the instructor ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the student ID */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the course ID */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is taken */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed, dropped) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student */,
  "final_score" REAL /* Final score of the student in the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendances" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the enrollment record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the class */,
  "present" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student was present */,
  "late" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student was late */,
  "excused" INTEGER /* Indicates if the absence was excused */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendances_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user ID */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., exam, announcement) */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification (e.g., student, faculty) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the semester */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the semester record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the semester record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the course ID */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., lecture notes, assignments) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the material */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the material record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the material record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the course ID */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the student ID */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the student */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the instructor ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the enrollment record */,
  "exam_name" TEXT /* Name of the examination */,
  "score" REAL /* Score received by the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the course ID */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user ID of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor assignment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor assignment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user ID */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of user login */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of user logout */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's login session */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the login session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
